page_content:
Prerequisite: HDCC105 and HDCC106.

Restriction: Must be in the Design Cultures and Creativity Honors College Living/Learning program.

HDCC208 Seminar in Digital Cultures and Creativity (3 Credits)

An advanced seminar in specific aspects of digital culture and creativity, designed to keep students abreast of the latest developments in new media and the online world. Possible topics include mobile gaming, digital storytelling, and electronic music.
